author: robocopsgonemad
content: has anyone used multiple LiteLLM instances chained together? the expectation being that if an agent requests use of a model from the first, and it is unavailable, it will proxy that upstream to the next one in the chain. transparently.

author: robocopsgonemad
content: they have a notion of "pass thru llms" but those require a different proxy endpoint, and so the agent needs to be aware of the setup.

author: robocopsgonemad
content: i.e. this https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/proxy/pass_through but more transparent. and assuming credential alignment is taken care of.
